claims.approved_text: SourceA is an AI execution platform powered by Forge.

## One law

> **SourceA is an AI execution platform powered by Forge — not a “proof records” product. Proof is built in; it is not the whole product.**

claims.approved_text: SourceA runs real builds, automations, and agent workflows with a verifiable receipt on every run.

provenance.literal_source_text: SourceA is an AI execution platform powered by Forge — real builds, automations, and agent workflows, with a verifiable receipt on every run.

SourceA is an AI execution platform powered by Forge — real builds, automations, and agent workflows, with a verifiable receipt on every run. Paste what you want done; Forge scopes one job, runs it through checks, and hands back work you can show clients.

claims.approved_text: Governance sources support layered SSOT authority: active operating law is v3; v6 refers to Forge world-system/self-building stack modules, with Mac dry-run/stub behavior and cloud-only full v6 when founder arms it.

provenance.literal_source_text: "active_operating_law_id": "llm_agent_operating_law_v3"

> **This index is the single entry point.** SourceA has layered SSOTs — Mac control plane (shipped) and cloud factory kernel (target) — plus a reconciliation map between them. Do not treat any one file as the entire system.
| v6 World system | `scripts/forge_world_system_v6.py` | `~/.sina/forge-world-system-tick-latest-v6.json` |

**Not production geopolitics.** Stub: `scripts/forge_world_state_v1.py` · `~/.sina/forge-world-state-v1.json`

Three seed nations: SourceA Mac · Cloud Forge Railway · Labs Sandbox.

Full v6 multi-nation conflict/trade = cloud simulation only when founder arms.

claims.approved_text: “Broken gears” is private diagnostic language, not public wording. Public response should say the route/tool/status looks unavailable, incomplete, or needs review.
